name: @narada2/mailbox-mcp
description: Read-only MCP surface for site-local synced mailbox projections.

scripts.test: pnpm build && node --disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning dist/test/mailbox-mcp.test.js && node --disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning dist/test/protocol-smoke.test.js && node --disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning dist/test/site-fabric-mailbox-e2e.test.js
